hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); [[ "$FILE" == *.py ]] && python -m isort "$FILE" --quiet 2>/dev/null; [[ "$FILE" == *.py ]] && python -m black "$FILE" --quiet 2>/dev/null; exit 0
FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); for p in ".env" ".env.local" "settings.py" "migrations/"; do [[ "$FILE" == *"$p"* ]] && echo "Blocked: $FILE is protected" >&2 && exit 2; done; exit 0
